$description: Derived from component CSS + doc page — do not edit by hand; regenerate with `node scripts/build-component-api.mjs`.
name: checkbox
title: Checkbox

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Focus halo is now keyboard-only (:has(:focus-visible) replaces :focus-within) so it no longer lingers after a mouse click selects the box. Simplified the tick: the glyph fades and settles in (opacity + scale) rather than stroke-drawing.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Added Figma ↔ code mapping (props) table to the Variants section — properties, values, and defaults sourced from the Stardust Components Figma library.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Component CSS (incl. ds-checkbox-field) extracted to shared assets/css/components/checkbox.css; focus/secondary references updated to grey-800 (WCAG 2.4.11, resolved 2026-06-11); anatomy rebuilt as deconstructed stack with hover highlighting.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Motion aligned to Material Design 3: state layer scales from scale(0) with asymmetric timing (200ms Standard in / 150ms Standard Accelerate out); box press squeeze scale(0.85); check/dash draw uses MD3 Emphasized Decelerate easing. Focus state updated: colour/focus/primary (#7BCAC5) for checked/indeterminate, colour/focus/secondary (#BDBDBD) for unchecked — solid halo, no border. Disabled visual tokens applied (was pointer-events only). Intermediate renamed to indeterminate throughout. Two new tokens added: colour/focus/primary, colour/focus/secondary.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Engineering section rebuilt to match button.html template — eng-section blocks, Props interface, Vue 3 / SwiftUI / Jetpack Compose examples, acceptance criteria. Open Questions section added.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Initial component page — 18 Figma variants, interactive demo, Vuetify motion reference, token matrix, a11y guidance.

props.values: default, hover, pressed, focused, error, disabled
